name: Fred Baca
description: Fred Baca is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Taos, NM. There are 4 outdoor concrete and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: High Altitude Health and Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at High Altitude Health and Fitness in El Prado, NM! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, and a pro shop or equipment store.

name: Roadrunner Campground
description: Roadrunner Campground is a place to play pickleball in Red River, NM. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.

name: Taos Academy Gym
description: Taos Academy Gym is a place to play pickleball in Taos, NM. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Limited to 36 members. Current fee based on $20/month plus $25 for balls and insurance expenses.

name: Taos Guadalupe Gym
description: Taos Guadalupe Gym is a place to play pickleball in Taos, NM. There are 7 wood and hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Taos Ski Valley
description: Enjoy one of the fastest-growing sports in the country against the breathtaking backdrop of the mountains at the highest Pickleball court in the US.

name: Taos Tennis at Quail Ridge
description: Taos Tennis at Quail Ridge is a place to play pickleball in El Prado, NM. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.
open_play_schedule: Sign up Team Reach L1 Intermediate Mon and Thurs. L2 Intermediate Wed and Fri. Adv Tuesday and Saturday
fees: Fee required — $15 drop in up and monthly rates

name: Taos Youth and Family Center
description: Taos Youth and Family Center is a place to play pickleball in Taos, NM. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Sign up Team Reach: code PBYFC
